variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16153 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16153 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16153 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AH1194 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16153
variants.description: .With over 1,500 different air filtration products, from clamps to air housings to advanced air filters, Fleetguard® provides peace of mind for your air filtration needs. Our Fleetguard AH1194 air housing is part of the heavy-duty air filtration line, covering your sophisticated air intake system requirements.
